title: user — authorization policies
description: Three policies. UserPolicy narrows by scope suffix (`.any` / `.tenant` / `.branch` / `.own`). ProfilePolicy is stricter (`.pii` gates the read side; only the subject or a `profile.update.pii` admin may write). TenantMemberPolicy is admin-only apart from the read-own case.

abilities.scope: resolved via ScopeSuffixResolver — `.tenant` narrows to the caller's active tenant, `.branch` to the caller's active branch (via `sports::Coach.branch_id`), `.any` unrestricted (platform_admin only)
single-row check by suffix. `.own` requires user_id === auth()->id(); every scope requires the target user's tenant_id to be visible to the caller.
admin or owner in the active tenant. Also gated by the entitlement slot `user_slot` — the observer decrements on create.
admin. Self-updates go through `me.update` instead — do NOT reuse `users.update` for the /me surface.
admin. Soft-delete; hard-delete via PurgeErasedUsersJob after the hold window.
admin. Only during the erasure hold window (soft-deleted rows past the window can't be restored — they've been purged).
admin. Cannot suspend the tenant owner unless caller is platform_admin.
admin. GDPR-triggered erasure. Also requires `compliance.gdpr.enabled` on the caller's region.
platform_admin only. Cross-tenant read for support tooling.
platform_admin only.
subject (`profile.user_id === auth()->id()`) OR admin with `profile.view.pii`. Without the `.pii` permission, redactor rules strip first_name / last_name / dob / phone_e164 from the response.
admin only. Guards egress of first_name / last_name / dob / phone_e164 columns.
admin OR guardian relationship via `sports::AthleteGuardian`. Guards egress when the subject is a minor per `identity->dob + user.privacy.adult_transition_age` computation.
subject OR admin. Non-subject writes require `profile.update.pii` too when touching the confidential columns.
admin only. Non-subject writes to first_name / last_name / dob / phone_e164.
subject or admin. Gated by the `avatar_upload` entitlement (all plans, but size scales with tier).
subject or admin.
any tenant member sees the roster within the active tenant. `.own` narrows to the caller's own memberships across the /me surface.
member of the target tenant.
owner or admin. Includes add / remove / change-role.
any User can switch between their own memberships — no admin required. Enforced via `membership.user_id === auth()->id()`.
